# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-server-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  server:
    routes:
    - match:
        method: GET
        pathPrefix: /
      route:
      - destination:
          host: backend-service
        port:
          number: 8080

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-auth-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  peers:
  - to:
    - namespace: default
      peer:
        serviceAccount: backend-service-account

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: my-ingressroute
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  gatewayRefs:
  - name: public-gateway
    namespace: linkerd-public
  routes:
  - match:
    - path:
        prefix: /
      methods:
      - GET
    kind:
      HTTP:
        service:
          name: my-service
          port: web
